headline: Here’s Why Parker-Hannifin Corporation (PH) is One of the Best Liquid Cooling Stocks to Buy for AI Data Centers
summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) ranks among our Best Liquid Cooling Stocks to Buy for AI Data Centers. Recently, on May 7, JPMorgan analyst Stephen Tusa lowered the firm’s price target on the stock from $1,100 to $1,060, while keeping an Overweight rating on the shares. ​The rating follows Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH)’s FQ3 2026 earnings, released on […]

headline: Evercore ISI Reaffirms Outperform on Parker-Hannifin (PH) Despite PT Reduction
summary: With a 5-year average dividend growth rate of 15.06%, Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Growth. On May 11, Evercore ISI lowered its price recommendation on Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) to $1,064 from $1,168. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. During the fiscal Q3 2026 earnings […]
